case_title: ANA PATRICIA ROMERO VS. NORMA NAVARETTE ROMERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2019 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JUN-17-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANA PATRICIA ROMERO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY NON-COURT INTERPRETER ANNA BRITO. DEFENDANT NORMA NAVARETTE ROMERO IS PRESENT. NON-CERTIFIED INTERPERTER WAS GIVEN THE INTERPERTER'S OATH BY CLERK R.SAHATJIAN. DEFENDANT REQUESTED AN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY ROMERO, ANA PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, NORMA NAVARETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION ADDRESS UPDATE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ROMERO, NORMA NAVARETTE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED APR-17-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, NORMA NAVARETTE
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR A SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, ANA PATRICIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ANA PATRICIA ROMERO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT NORMA NAVARETTE ROMERO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MARLON VALASQUZ. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, ANA PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, NORMA NAVARETTE $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
